title: WAIM - What am I missing?
description: A mod that makes the missing entries gui a bit easier to traverse!
body:
A mod that makes the missing entries gui a bit easier to traverse!

Using WAIM, you are able to use the mouse scroll wheel to traverse the missing entries on the missing entries gui (for when mod remove blocks or a mod is removed)

WAIM will also guess the reason the entry is missing, telling the user if the mod was removed, or if the single entry was deleted.

WAIM also adds a button that will open your native text editor giving you a list of the missing entries.

If you would like to support me in my modding endeavors, you can become a patron via  Patreon.
